# terrible_netapp_cloudmanager_na_cloudmanager_connector_aws (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) The name of the Cloud Manager connector for AWS to manage.
- `region` (String) The region where the Cloud Manager Connector will be created.

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) The NetApp tenancy account ID.
- `ami` (String) The image ID.
- `associate_public_ip_address` (Boolean) Indicates whether to associate a public IP address to the instance. If not provided, the association will be done based on the subnet's configuration.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `aws_tag` (String) Additional tags for the AWS EC2 instance.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `client_id` (String) The unique client ID of the Connector. The connector ID.
- `company` (String) The name of the company of the user.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enable_termination_protection` (Boolean) Indicates whether to enable termination protection on the instance.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name竊致alue).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `iam_instance_profile_name` (String) The name of the instance profile for the Connector.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `instance_id` (String) The ID of the EC2 instance used for delete.
- `instance_type` (String) The type of instance (for example, t3.xlarge). At least 4 CPU and 16 GB of memory are required.
- `key_name` (String) The name of the key pair to use for the Connector instance.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `proxy_certificates` (String) The proxy certificates, a list of certificate file names.
- `proxy_password` (String) The proxy password, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.
- `proxy_url` (String) The proxy URL, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.
- `proxy_user_name` (String) The proxy user name, if using a proxy to connect to the internet.
- `security_group_ids` (String) The IDs of the security groups for the instance, multiple security groups can be provided separated by ','.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Whether the specified Cloud Manager connector for AWS should exist or not.
- `subnet_id` (String) The ID of the subnet for the instance.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `ids` (String) Newly created AWS client ID in cloud manager, instance ID and account ID.
